Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}As you complete more requests, Elizabeth will start asking you to escort her to different places from time to time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can accompany her on these outings any time during daylight hours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Going out with Elizabeth will take no time at all, so you don't need to worry about planning your day around her.[n]{f 1 1}
